reviews.text: Very disappointing experience. After purchasing a health insurance policy, I found several errors in my proposal form, including an incorrect address, incorrect nominee relationship, and inaccurate medical history details. I immediately informed the support team and submitted all required documents for correction. Despite multiple follow-ups, the issues were not resolved promptly. Insurance documents should be accurate, and customers should not have to repeatedly request basic corrections.

Very disappointing experience with . I purchased a bike insurance policy through their app and entered my vehicle number correctly, everything initially appeared accurate. However, when I received the policy document, the model and variant were completely different. I raised a request to correct this mistake, but instead of resolving it, they are asking me to pay extra charges. The amount they are demanding is almost equal to the cost of buying a new policy. This is unfair and unprofessional.

The single most annoying thing I have come across in recent times, so much so that I specifically came to play store to write a review. The moment you go on their site, you will get n number of calls, irrespective of time like vultures converging on you. Irrespective of the product they provide, it's so overwhelming to receive so many calls. I really hope they are this enthusiastic when it actually comes to redeeming the policy!! Update: I would suggest no one to buy from here.

Buying policies from PolicyBazaar is easy and hassle free. But the reason for 1star is there customer support. For everything you browse they'll call, but when they start to pressurize the customers with question why, when.. it's becomes an awkward conversation. The guy I came through, started judging me and talked rudely, fighting over who does term Insurance search for time pass, if you didn't want. Hence uninstalling the app. Never gonna use again.

Started using this almost a month ago, with a deliberate goal to invest in a few good policies. The initial process is almost as easy as booking a flight. Then starts the annoyance. People start calling you in a threatening tone, just to remind you of your idiocy of not booking for a term plan. When you click on your policy, you can't even see the detailed status of your policy in the app. BTW, after a month, when I am trying to cancel my policies and get my money back, I can't.

The worst service of all-time. I tried to buy a policy which got rejected. 1. They haven't notified me the reasons even after asking multiple times 2. My refund is pending since last three weeks 3. Their chat service is the worst I've seen in the digital customer relationship management section the person at the other end doesn't respond only. 4. I had scheduled a call, huh what call no call was received .

Please don't purchase any type of policy, online from policy bazaar, only use this app for comparison and knowledge. Their app shows that purchasing policy is very easy by just sharing few details and payment done. But once payment done, n number of documents are required which is a surprise for a new person. Actually , if I'm not wrong, everywhere documents list is given first & once it's complete & ok, payment asked from customers. This is a wrong or better say a fraud method.

Annoying calls if u search something in the app. Without number it doesn't allow login so cannot help but had to add number. Dummy numbers didn't seem to work. The team should refrain from making calls unless someone asks for it through help or support. Anyone downloading app is educated enough to read through the details and decide for themselves which one to go for. We do not necessarily need assistance on everything we search on the app. If there is any need, we can contact support.

Very disappointing experience with Policybazaar. I was asked to pay ₹2,000 as part of the loan disbursement process, but after making the payment, there has been no update, no response, and no progress on my loan application. Customer support has been unhelpful, and I feel misled. I would strongly advise others to be cautious and verify all charges before making any payments. My experience has been frustrating and has resulted in a loss of trust.

The worst service is that they offer support until you buy a policy, but after the policy, they offer absolutely no support. You call them regularly. They don't even reply back. Every time, they say they fixed the problem, but they never reply. Same happened with me a day before my birthday a link was sent to a premium policy bazaar and I paid the premium. But the next day auto detected and from my account for the second time, which was the next date of my birthday and increased my premium.

very worst experience. Don't buy any type of policy from policybazaar. They are moving towards doing frauds day by day. Their advisor will talk very politely before buying the policy but once you are done, he will not even pick your calls. The premium amount shown toe was different than the one issued in the policy. its been 15 days now but no resolution is provided.

My experience with Policybazaar was terrible. They failed to clearly explain important policy exclusions at the time of purchase. Sales promises and actual policy benefits did not match. After renewal, I discovered that health check-up benefits were not included. Poor customer guidance, lack of transparency, and a waste of my hard-earned money. Not recommended.

Despite having completed my transaction, I am receiving multiple daily calls from various departments (Life, Health, and other insurance verticals) attempting to sell me further products. This high volume of calls has crossed into harassment and is severely disrupting my day. Don't buy Insurance from them they will spam you like anything, I am getting 4-5 calls each day and they are not even taking any action despite that I already registered for DND but still they are harassing me.

As a first rime user, immensely disappointed with policy bazar user. signup & each time you are online triggers a call from policy bazar offering assistance. You post a technical issue, then its an email exchange, why isnt policy bazar making sincere attempt to invetigate and respond to app store complaint? instead they email you to share details as if its specific to your login. I complained that the process of add another mobile which needs otp sms to complete the process was not sending OTP

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent Experience with Policybazaar! Policybazaar is one of the best apps for comparing and buying insurance policies. The app is easy to use, offers multiple options from different insurers, and helps in finding the right plan at a competitive price. The customer support team is responsive and helpful throughout the process. Policy purchase and renewal are quick and hassle-free. Highly recommended for anyone looking for health, life, or vehicle insurance. Great service and smooth user

what is this nonsense bhai, i logged in via my mobile number but on profile I got someone else email, namel, DOB. I'm not going to use this application anymore 🤡. One thing more you can't replace a human customer support with bot🤡, either provide more context to your calling bot or remove it.

They will do and say anything to sell any insurance policy including sharing their mobile number and offering to be personally reachable even after the sale to help you but they will not be and their after sales support is not good. Do not trust them. Proceed at your own risk.

The services provided were unsatisfactory. Policybazaar lacks verified information regarding its affiliated garages. Inaccurate and deceptive information was disseminated during the recent claim process. Promises made to customers prior to policy acquisition were not fulfilled and totally false promises. negative 5 star ratings deserves the app.

Very poor service. There are significant delays in processing claims and resolving issues. The insurance company causes a lot of inconvenience during the claim process, making customers go through unnecessary hassle. Overall, a disappointing experience and not recommended.

Very frustrating experience. I only visited their website to check their services, and soon started receiving repeated calls from multiple sales representatives. When I asked if they could check whether someone from their company had already contacted me, they had no idea. It seems visitor details are shared widely without proper coordination, resulting in excessive and unnecessary calls. This feels intrusive and unprofessional.

As greedy as it gets. Will entice you as long as you are new customer. Even for renewals will keep you waiting for 48hrs. Good luck if your claims gets processed ever. No point in having an intermediary if they are not responsive.
Good app to compare policies. But too many promo calls once you open the app or go to their site.

Worst application i just visited for some research basis and i soon started receiving multiple calls from their staff team and also when i requested to be left alone then they say, "fir site kyu visit kre hai aap" by person named Prince "Worst experience"
Total waste of time and money keeping this app in phone .The provide no support .This app is merely menat for comparison of rates .Sales team is hyperactive ,service team is deadwood.
Spend almost a month to get a minor scratch on car insurance... pathetic service 🤢. Better spend a few more money and get something from your local guy or garage for the car.

I purchased motor insurance for my car but after repairing when amount reimbursement is processed. Policy bazar intentionally delayed process by said surveyor report pending. When I contacted to surveyor he already submitted report. Policy bazar only selling product and take their margin. They didn't help to get claim.

This is one of the worst insurance broker apps I have ever used. The app collects payment before properly verifying vehicle details or reviewing the required documents. Only after the payment is completed do their customer care agents start verifying the vehicle information. If any mistake is found, there is no proper option in the app to edit or update the details. In my case, after taking the payment, their customer care team informed me that the vehicle variant was incorrect and asked me to

One of the worst experiences I have had. I purchased a policy for a year, but after 20 days I decided I no longer wanted it. I had paid more than ₹25,000, but after cancellation, I received only around ₹20,000.Very disappointing experience.Actually I took the other policy and paid more than 20000 again. Later, due to a one-day premium payment delay, my health policy became inactive, and even after more than a month, there has been no proper response from Policybazaarteam.

Horrible customer experience. Their insurance renewal follow-ups are incredibly aggressive and annoying. They call constantly from multiple different numbers to bypass blocks, showing absolutely no respect for your privacy or schedule. It feels like dealing with aggressive loan sharks rather than an insurance provider. I've deleted the app and moved to a better alternative.

Very disappointed with the after-sales support and claim assistance provided by Policybazaar. Buying the policy was quick and smooth, but the real problem started when I needed support for my claim. Even after submitting all the required documents, including stamped copies provided by the hospital, the claim process kept getting delayed with repeated requests for the same documents. Instead of helping customers during difficult situations the support team always gives generic responses.

Extremely aggressive and intrusive experience. The moment you show any interest, agents push you to make a payment on the call itself, even if you clearly say you need time to think. They keep insisting you can just pay now and cancel later for a refund. Even after saying no or hanging up, the calls don’t stop. Expect repeated follow-ups for weeks or months. Feels less like a comparison platform and more like a pushy sales machine.

Don’t buy policies from here. I purchased a policy and cancelled it on the same day, but even after more than 20 days, I have not received my refund. Customer support is very poor — calls get disconnected or they promise a callback but do not resolve the issue. I have contacted them multiple times via calls and emails, but till now there has been no proper response or resolution. Very disappointing experience. Not recommended

Worst customer service. If possible I would like to give minus rating to them. They are super active at the time of Pre-sales calls but as soon as you purchase a product from them they will forget who you are. Pathetic Post-sales service. I will never buy any product from them in future and will never recommend anyone for the same.

it's a useless app, none of the features are provided. you need to raise a service request for every little thing where they'll call and spam you with more policies. why not just keep a number to reach, instead of the app or the website. there is no need to call and spam for everything. Policy bazar spam calls like there's no tomorrow.

In the Policy Bazaar app, the name is on the screen. The company has a name on the documents. After the insurance, no matter how many times you use tokens to change it, the name does not change. These days I have contacted customer support many times.. basically as long as you don't need a claim, buying here is good, otherwise disappointing.

Worst experience ever with Policybazaar. I paid for a policy, but the app shows completely wrong details. My name is shown in the app, but the downloaded policy belongs to some unknown person. This is highly irresponsible and unsafe when dealing with insurance and personal data. Feels like a scam-level mistake. Fix your system before handling customer

The support team just gave me the runaround, reciting scripts instead of providing actual steps or helping with the documentation. They are quick to call you a dozen times a day when you're buying a policy, but the moment you need support for a claim, they disappear or pass

Definitely not recommended if you expect any actual support after buying the policy.
Totally worst service is not good for customers It takes a long time to claim settlement and in the end do not have a satisfied claim to the customer don't use this app

very bad experience... premiums they show for renewal in the home page, message and emails will not remain the same if you got to payment and it's 25% more and there is no option to remove the added riders... and requested a callback and either they won't call or call once and keep themselves muted for a few seconds and disconnect... while buying the policy there were so many people reaching out daily

Poor customer service ruins the app's value I downloaded Polosybagar hoping for reliable health services, especially the annual health check-up feature tied to the premium subscription. I tried booking and following up on my annual check-up multiple times, but they never picked up calls, kept postponing, and ultimately wasted my entire package without any service

“Buying a new policy is incredibly easy—just visit their app, and you’ll receive endless calls instantly. But when it comes to raising a claim, the experience is completely different. You may have to call them countless times, yet there’s little to no response. Quick to sell, but slow to support when it truly matters.”

Very poor experience with Policybazaar. I bought car insurance but even after 13 days the policy was not issued. Finally I had to initiate a refund. Extremely frustrating service and they clearly do not take customers seriously. Not recommended.

Good app with a fast and smooth verification process. However, the customer service is very poor. I recently purchased a Workmen Compensation Policy and needed some assistance, but unfortunately, no one has contacted me yet. This lack of support after purchase is quite disappointing.

Very poor experience with PolicyBazaar. The insurance policy was delivered after 7 days, and even after such a long delay, the address mentioned in the policy is completely wrong. Due to this mistake, I am facing issues in my vehicle transfer process. This kind of negligence in important documents is unacceptable. I expected professional and timely service, but the overall experience has been very disappointing. Kindly improve your customer support and verification process to avoid such issues

I strongly do NOT recommend Policybazaar for investment or policy purchase. My experience has been extremely disappointing, especially in terms of misleading expectations and poor returns. The platform focuses more on selling policies rather than helping customers understand what they are actually buying. Once the policy is purchased, support and clarity become very limited. If you are serious about your financial security, avoid third-party platforms and go directly to the insurance company.

This app is very bad, when you buy a policy for two wheeler or four wheeler, then normally it tells only the main points ahead, after that it does not tell which model it is inside, when you check the policy after buying it and want to get it rectified, then you are again asked to pay the same amount from Policy Bazaar, that is, they cheat you.

In this growing tech world, It would be better to see PB having a widget on the phone, so that it would be easy to track the growth on the main screen rather than going into the app or website.. also sometimes it takes more than days to see the portfolio being updated.

best when u get the policy done but worst ever service when it comes to claims. it took a week to get surveyor appointed. it is not appointed yet. better to take the policy directly from the company than policy Bazar. it is a process which increases your time when the claims are ter. don't go for it. to save a few bucks it gives u lot of trouble while taking claims
